📲 Install as App
Add your Royal Roadmap to your Dock or Applications for instant access — no App Store needed.
✅ Google Chrome on Mac — Recommended Method
1
Find the HTML file in Finder → Right-click → Open With → Google Chrome
2
Once loaded in Chrome, look at the address bar (top right) — you may see a small computer/install icon ⊕. Click it → Install. Done.
3
If no install icon appears, click the ⋮ three-dot menu (top-right) → look for "Cast, save, and share" or "More tools" → click "Create shortcut…"
4
Tick "Open as window" → click Create — Royal Roadmap is added to your Applications folder and appears in your Dock automatically
5
To pin it to the Dock permanently: find it in Applications → right-click the Dock icon → Options → Keep in Dock
🛠️ Mac Backup Method — Automator App (works without Chrome)
1
Open Automator (search in Spotlight). Choose "New Document" → select "Application"
2
In the search box type "Open Finder Items" → drag it into the workflow on the right
3
Click Add and select your Royal Roadmap HTML file
4
Click File → Save → name it "Royal Roadmap" → save to Applications
5
Open Finder → Applications → drag Royal Roadmap to your Dock. Done.
📱 iPhone & iPad — Add to Home Screen
1
Transfer the Royal Roadmap HTML file to your device (via AirDrop, iCloud Drive, or Files app)
2
Open the file in Safari on your iPhone or iPad
3
Tap the Share button ⬆ at the bottom of the screen → scroll down → tap "Add to Home Screen"
4
Name it Royal Roadmap → tap Add — the icon appears on your Home Screen like a native app
⚠️ Why Safari "Add to Dock" is greyed out on Mac: Apple's Safari only allows "Add to Dock" for pages loaded from an https:// web address — not local files on your computer. This is a Safari restriction that cannot be bypassed. Use Chrome or the Automator method above — both work every time with local files.

Most Urgent — Act Now
🔴 Driving Test — 18 August 2026
Pass your UK driving test before the deadline.
Book a mock test this week. Revise hazard perception 30 minutes daily — no exceptions. This unlocks independence, business mobility, and the family car goal.
🔴 ATHE Level 4 Diploma — August 2026
Complete your remaining assignments by August 2026.
Write 500 words today. Break your next assignment into PEEL paragraphs. This diploma is the gateway to your Master's degree and the governance career that serves your Royal mission.

💼 Work Experience
Managing Director / Care Coordinator
Pamikyx Limited · London, UK
Feb 2022 – Present
Founded and operated an independent home care company. Manages regulatory compliance, CQC accountability, client health risk assessments, staff scheduling, care coordination and personalised care plans. Built compliance infrastructure including BrightHR, policies and procedures from day one.
Senior Personal Care Assistant / Live-In Carer
Abicare Ltd & Agincare Ltd · Salisbury, UK
2020 – Present
Delivering comprehensive 24/7 dedicated home-based support. Monitoring client health conditions, facilitating ADLs, and partnering with clinical teams and family networks on bespoke care plans.
Lead Night Support Worker
Care Tech Community Services Ltd · Stockport, UK
2018 – 2020
Supervised nocturnal care routines, conducted clinical observations, and responded to medical and behavioural emergencies with crisis intervention strategies.
Support Worker
Serendipity Care Home · Manchester, UK
Jan 2018 – Jun 2018
Physical, emotional and psychological support to residents with acute care needs, consistently prioritising dignity and personal choice.
Team Leader Support Worker
Creative Support Ltd · Stockport, UK
2004 – 2016
Directed frontline care staff teams focused on high-acuity learning and physical disabilities. 12 years of team leadership experience.
Freelance Care & Community Volunteer
Self-Employed & Community Engagement
2002 – 2004
Eldercare assistance and community outreach. The foundation of a 22-year care career.

👑 Royal Mission & Vision
Royal Title
HRH Prince Kwame Nkrabea — Heir Apparent, Suaman Dadiaso Traditional Council
Succession
Formally designated by the Paramount Queen Mother (Omanhemaa) of Suaman Dadiaso through a sacred transfer of royal authority
Coronation Target
31 December 2028 — Post-coronation title: His Majesty King [Stool Name], King of Suaman Dadiaso Traditional Area
Mission
Building systems that outlive the Kingdom — a community where opportunity is created, wealth is circulated, and every individual has the tools to grow, contribute, and lead
Five Pillars
Governance · Economic Development · Education · Health · Cultural Preservation
Spiritual Guide
Taoism — Wu Wei (Lao Tzu): harmony with the natural flow, inner peace, trust in the process

👑 Royal Command Centre
Your personal daily operations assistant
Reads your live Rota, Finance, Goals, Schedule, Money Hub & Diary. Nothing is typed twice.
🏰 Royal Residence Development
Every pound into your home in Ghana, tracked by stage
Spend you log in Money Hub under Ghana → 🏗️ Home Residence Construction, 🌍 Land or 🏰 Building the Throne is counted here automatically.
🏘️ Royal Family Support
Money sent to Ghana — family & home, at a glance
Reads your Money Hub entries tagged 🇬🇭 Ghana and 🏘️ Family. Add money fast with Quick Capture → 💸 Money to Ghana.
⚖️ Chieftaincy Affairs & Coronation
Legal matters, coronation preparation, stakeholders & costs — all in one place
Money logged here is saved once in your Money Hub — no double-counting. Dated court & coronation items also appear on your Home Command Centre.
💷 Income & Wealth
What you earn, where it goes, and your money health
Reads your Money Hub income. Add income fast with Quick Capture → 💷 Income.
👑 Executive Wealth
Your whole financial kingdom in one view
Pulls together Income, Money Hub, Royal Residence, Family Support & your 17 Goals. Updates as you record money.
💳 Spending
Where your money goes — tracked & categorised
Reads your Money Hub spending (expenses & personal). Add fast with Quick Capture → 🛒 Expense.
📔 New Diary Entry
🔄 Sync Between Devices
Transfer ALL your data — Money Hub, Goals, Debts, Rota, Diary, Settings
📦 What will be synced from this device
How cross-device sync works:
Each device stores data locally in the browser. To move data:
① Export on this device → ② Copy the code (or 💾 Download File → AirDrop to iPhone/iPad) → ③ Open this app on your other device → ④ Paste & Import
💡 Tip: Email yourself the code, then open it on your iPad or iPhone.
Step 1 — Export from this device
📱 Or scan this QR code on your other device (works for small datasets)
⚠️ Dataset too large for QR. Use Copy or Email above.
Step 2 — Import on your other device
Open this app on your iPad or iPhone, go to ⋯ More → Sync, then paste the code below and tap Import.
Add Debt
TYPE OR SPEAK A COMMAND
💬 Type a command above or tap the mic button to speak
📔 Diary: "New diary entry" · "Write in diary"
🎯 Goals: "Add new goal" · "New goal"
💳 Debts: "Add new debt" · "New debt"
📅 Rota: "New rota" · "Add shift"
💰 Money: "Add income 500 from Abicare"
            "Add expense 45 Tesco"
📊 Reports: "Generate report this month"
🧭 Navigate: "Open money hub" · "Go to goals"
              "Show diary" · "Open debts"
📈 Stats: "Total income" · "Debt summary"
💾 Other: "Backup" · "Export report"
